states.name: queued
states.description: Durable Activity accepted and waiting for eligibility, dependency, scheduling or preparation.
entry_requirements: Activity Request was accepted and durable ledger identity exists.

states.name: preparing
states.description: Placement, leases, inputs, restoration or Provider preparation are in progress.

states.name: running
states.description: The orchestrator is advancing required Operations or at least one required current Operation is executing.
entry_requirements: Current execution context is valid or reconciled.

states.name: waiting
states.description: Durable wait for a structured dependency, timer, human action, capacity, external result or other registered reason.

states.name: paused
states.description: Pause is acknowledged; no new ordinary work may start until resume or cancellation.
entry_requirements: Pause acknowledgement and current checkpoint/limitations are recorded.

states.name: resuming
states.description: Previously paused work is reacquiring and revalidating execution state.
entry_requirements: Resume authority and compatibility are valid.

states.name: recovering
states.description: Ptah is reconciling uncertain, stale or disconnected state after failure, restart or observation loss.
entry_requirements: Recovery reason and reconciliation scope are recorded.

states.name: completed
states.description: Declared Activity completion condition and required Activity-level results are recorded.
entry_requirements: Required Operations reached acceptable terminal proof and result references are retained.

states.name: failed
states.description: Activity is terminally unsuccessful under the current policy and retained evidence.
entry_requirements: Typed failure class and outcome are retained.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Cancellation reached the declared cleanup and termination boundary.
entry_requirements: Cancellation result and cleanup evidence are retained.

required_preconditions: Activity Request is accepted and canonical Activity ID is durably allocated.
Current Node, Provider, workload generations and leases are valid.
Structured wait reason and wake/reconciliation condition are recorded.
Pause was acknowledged and current safety/checkpoint limitations are recorded.
Resume is authorized and checkpoint/session compatibility is acceptable.
Projection is stale, execution is uncertain, or a required component restarted/disconnected.
Declared completion condition is satisfied; required Operation proof and Activity results are present.
Failure policy declares terminal failure and typed evidence/outcome are present.
Cancellation Request reached terminal completion and required cleanup evidence exists.
